remember: Students will be able to recall the importance of staffing in an organization.
Students will be able to identify the different types of staffing.
Students will be able to list the various functions of the personnel department.
understand: Students will be able to understand the concept of internal and external sources of recruitment.
Students will be able to comprehend the role of the personnel department in an organization.
Students will be able to explain the factors influencing staffing in an organization.
apply: Students will be able to apply the principles of staffing in a real-world scenario.
Students will be able to design a staffing plan for an organization.
Students will be able to evaluate the effectiveness of a staffing system in an organization.
analyze: Students will be able to analyze the impact of staffing on organizational performance.
Students will be able to evaluate the pros and cons of different staffing strategies.
Students will be able to compare the advantages and disadvantages of internal and external recruitment.

ncert_objectives: Explain the various sources of recruitment and selection.
Describe the functions of the personnel department.
Discuss the factors influencing staffing in an organization.
board_exam_objectives: Explain the importance of staffing in an organization.
Discuss the role of the personnel department in an organization.
Explain the factors influencing staffing in an organization.
Evaluate the effectiveness of a staffing system in an organization.
